{% include "header.html" %} {# Find the current term by URL match, then render the page body in that iteration. We do it inline because Crinja `set` is loop-local and lacks `namespace`/`update`. #} {% for key, data in site.authors %} {% if page.url == "/authors/" + key + "/" or page.url == "/ko/authors/" + key + "/" %} {% set author = site.data.authors[key] %}

{% endif %}

{% if page.language == "ko" %}작성한 글{% else %}Posts{% endif %}

    {# `data.pages` aggregates EN + KO. Hwaro leaves the per-page `language` blank on aggregated entries, so we filter by URL prefix: KO posts live under `/ko/...`. #} {% for post in data.pages %} {% set is_ko = (post.url | replace("/ko/", "")) != post.url %} {% set keep = (page.language == "ko" and is_ko) or (page.language != "ko" and not is_ko) %} {% if keep %}
  • {{ post.date }}

{% endif %} {% endfor %}
